checks.result: 512/128 median 1949.431/127.171 tok/s and 4K/128 median 2255.344/114.689 tok/s; stable IDs and flat memory but both primary gates regressed versus retained 1024-square TN16 baseline.

checks.result: Stable IDs and memory, but candidate regressed 512/128 and 4K/128 prefill and regressed 4K decode beyond run-noise tolerance; 128K final check skipped because primary verifier failed.
